summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a stellar show highlighted by an unforgettable Dark Star and Ken Kesey’s moving tribute to Bill Graham.
review: The performance is praised as an all‑around awesome show, with the early Dark Star standing out and a historic eulogy from Ken Kesey that adds emotional weight. Reviewers note no recording problems, implying a clear, high‑quality soundboard capture that lets listeners fully enjoy the moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive review (5 stars) mentions both superb show content and no recording issues, leading to a near‑perfect rating but limited data for confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No complaints; reviewers imply clear, crisp sound with no noticeable flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong early set highlighted by a memorable Dark Star and a historic Ken Kesey eulogy for Bill Graham.
